summary: Iteration 37: Phase 5A Clinical Product Reclassification fully verified. All 14 backend tests passed (1 skipped - ortho-smart product not found). Frontend tests confirm: (1) clinical_subtitle displayed below product titles, (2) System Intelligence card removed, (3) Portfolio nav link works, (4) Category sidebar filtering works, (5) SKU table with search and CSV export works.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products with clinical reclassification applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5A Clinical Reclassification complete. Key changes verified: (1) Products reclassified from brand-centric to clinical-centric names (e.g., '2.4mm LPS Distal Radial Volar Buttress Plate' instead of 'ARMAR Titanium Plates'), (2) Brand info moved to clinical_subtitle field (e.g., 'AURIC by Meril • Titanium • TiNbN Coating'), (3) System Intelligence card (data-testid='semantic-intelligence-card') removed from product detail page, (4) Portfolio nav link points to /catalog, (5) Division page product cards show clinical_subtitle below product name.

api_divisions.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns all 4 divisions with product counts

api_products_clinical_subtitle.GET /api/catalog/products?division=Cardi: PASS - Products returned (BioMime stays in title)

api_product_detail.specific_product_2.4mm_lps: PASS - Title: '2.4mm LPS Distal Radial Volar Buttress Plate', Subtitle: 'AURIC by Meril • Titanium • TiNbN Coating'

api_brand_intelligence.GET /api/catalog/brand-intelligence/ARMA: PASS - Backend semantic data still accessible

frontend_product_detail.sku_table: PASS - SKU table with search and CSV export works

frontend_division_page.product_cards_clinical_subtitle: PASS - Cards show clinical_subtitle below product name
frontend_division_page.category_sidebar_filter: PASS - Category filter buttons work and update URL
